title: FlameTech
description: A mod centered around technology and building better and better machines
body:
![The FlameTech logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/742c337da6180225f991c245e5b7924a2ba9d0d1_0.webp)
Currently all the mod does is add 2 blocks and an item and change some recipes.
Items:
- Fire Stick
  - Holding one in your off hand and main hand and using the place button will have a chance to create a flame. If a fire does happen the fire sticks will be destroyed
Blocks:
- Log Pile
  - crafted with 5 logs in the shape of a boat
  - When clicked on with a flint and steel or with 2 fire sticks it will turn into a campfire
- Burnt Stone
  - Made by placing a stone block on a campfire. (the stone block can be made by placing a cobblestone block on a campfire)
  - used to craft a furnace
